forward_inputs.cmp_kv: [B, C, 1, D] compressed shared KV or null
forward_inputs.ori_sparse_indices: null for band/sliding-window mode in DSv4 wrapper
forward_inputs.cmp_sparse_indices: [B, S, 1, K] int32 compressed selected groups for cmp_ratio=4
forward_inputs.cmp_ratio: 1 for SWA/CFA-like paths, 4 for sparse compressed attention path in wrapper

forward_outputs_saved_for_backward.saved_tensors: query, ori_kv, cmp_kv, result, softmax_lse, ori_sparse_indices, cmp_sparse_indices, sinks

doc_pipeline: Cube12 for QK and dO dot V style matrix work
Process softmax, row stats, and intermediate gradients
Cube345 for dQ and selected dK/dV math
Scatter gradients back into original and compressed KV banks

ascend_sparse_lightning_indexer_grad_kl_.forward_behavior: returns a dummy fp32 scalar loss; real KL loss and LI gradients are deferred to backward to avoid duplicate activation-checkpoint recompute

inputs.query_index: LI query tensor, grad output required
inputs.key_index: LI key tensor, grad output required
inputs.weight: LI per-token or per-head weights tensor, grad output required
inputs.sparse_indices: top-k sparse indices selected by LightningIndexer
inputs.softmax_max: optional main-attention row max or null in DSv4 wrapper
inputs.softmax_sum: optional main-attention row sum or null in DSv4 wrapper

outputs_from_backward.loss: [1] fp32, scaled by token count in wrapper

doc_pipeline: V0 gathers top-k main-attention K and LI K rows
C1 computes main-attention QK and LI QK products
V1 computes KL loss derivative and dW

shared_kv_public_abi.wrapper: sources/wip/torchtitan/torchtitan/models/deepseek_v4/sparse_mla_shared_kv_triton_forward_backend.py exposes sparse_attn_sharedkv(query, ori_kv, cmp_kv, cmp_sparse_indices, sinks, ...)

shared_kv_backward_slice.best_raw_query_major_tile: H64/N64, 14.36 ms median on S4096 with 640 selected keys/query
shared_kv_backward_slice.retained_autograd_bridge: H64/N128, sparse_mla_shared_kv(...).backward() 17.73 ms median at S4096
shared_kv_backward_slice.boundary_read: TorchTitan-shaped q/wkv_a/RoPE/LI/compression/shared-KV attention/wo fwd+bwd is 23.36 ms; raw shared-KV autograd slice is 17.84 ms and output projection fwd+bwd is 3.32 ms.

li_fused_floor.target_probs: 0.97 ms S4096, no selected main-K materialization
li_fused_floor.full_unfused_pipeline: 4.49 ms S4096 for target_probs + LI logits + derivative + dQ/dK/dW as separate Triton calls

gap_read.why_next_probe: The Ascend SASG/SLIG design says the backward win comes from fusing Gather/Cube/Process/Scatter and fusing main-attention target scores with LI backward. AMD already has fast LI target and derivative slices; the unresolved wall is shared-KV dKV/scatter and integration with LI/compressor gradients.

next_clean_gpu_probe.purpose: Attribute the query-major shared-KV backward wall by route composition before designing the next production kernel schedule.
next_clean_gpu_probe.required_condition: Run only when rocm-smi --showpidgpus shows no external GPU benchmark using GPU 0.
next_clean_gpu_probe.discarded_note: An accidental concurrent local-only/compressed-only launch happened while another GPU benchmark was active; do not use those timings as authoritative.

interpretation.local_dominates: Not the observed result; local-only is 3.83 ms.
interpretation.compressed_dominates: Observed result; compressed-topk-only is 11.02 ms, about 76.5% of the full local+compressed raw query-major time.
interpretation.full_exceeds_sum_pattern: Not the observed result; full is slightly below local-only plus compressed-only, so the next cut should optimize the compressed top-k branch rather than mixed-route contention.

derived_read.read: The full raw query-major S4096 backward slice is essentially the local and compressed routes added together, with the compressed top-k route accounting for most of the wall. This points the next production cut at compressed top-k dKV/scatter/dynamic selected-group reuse, not the sliding-window local route.

recommended_next_implementation_cut.description: Keep the proven query-major dQ path, but prioritize the compressed-topk dKV branch first. A route-split implementation should keep the original-window and compressed-topk paths separately visible, matching Ascend's separate ori_kv/d_cmp_kv gradient contract, but the clean route-slice result says compressed-topk dKV/scatter and dynamic selected-group reuse are the dominant wall.
promotion_gate: S4096 route-split full path faster than 14.36 ms raw query-major H64/N64
No selected K/V or probability tensors saved across forward/backward
Public sparse_attn_sharedkv ABI still returns d_query, d_ori_kv, d_cmp_kv, d_sinks
